meta_description: Explore our dental services including consultations, whitening, periodontics, implants and more.
headline: SERVICES.
intro: We provide all types of dental services. Call us for more information!
item_1_desc: Comprehensive consultation — includes full oral diagnostics, CT scan and treatment plan. Orthodontist consultation — €40. Endodontist / Surgeon / Orthopedist — €25. Periodontist / Whitening consultation — €15.
item_2_desc: Oral hygiene monitoring and professional treatment by a periodontist.
item_3_desc: Effect guaranteed for 3 years! Full teeth and gum analysis, in-office whitening procedure, custom trays and gels for home whitening + Tooth Colour Passport.
item_4_desc: An add-on service available for any procedure. Fundamentally different from general anaesthesia.
item_5_desc: Restoration of damaged tooth structure using modern photopolymer composite materials.
item_6_desc: Permanent replacement for missing teeth using titanium implants with a quality guarantee.
